---
title: 'You''re never too old for @ChuckECheese in #GrapevineTX!'
date: '2016-05-29T04:10:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8288156916297569528'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/youre-never-too-old-for-chuckecheese-in.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Family'
  - 'Fun'
  - 'Food'
---

<div class="mobile-photo" style="text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0305151854-760096-a85263bcfc12.jpg"><img alt="" border="0" id="BLOGGER_PHOTO_ID_6122919810643588178" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/0305151854-760096-bbb920f1f8ef.jpg" /></a></div>
<br />
You're never too old for @ChuckECheese in #GrapevineTX!
